split: chronological timestamp boundary at min_ts + 0.70 * (max_ts - min_ts)

structures.confirm: sign(imb_5), sign(imb_20), and sign(wall_skew) each equal sign(price_change)
structures.contradict: sign(imb_5), sign(imb_20), and sign(wall_skew) each equal -sign(price_change)

path_execution: first valid recorded path_json observation with age_seconds >= horizon_seconds; no interpolation
overlap: one selected position per symbol in any rolling 300 seconds, per configuration
final: never opened; this is a two-way train/validation replay only
